description: Windows server monitoring with container metrics via cadvisor

panels.description: Busy state of all CPU cores together

targets.expr: (sum by(instance) (irate(windows_cpu_time_total{host="$host", mode!="idle"}[$__rate_interval])) / on(instance) group_left sum by (instance)((irate(windows_cpu_time_total{host="$host"}[$__rate_interval])))) * 100

panels.title: CPU Busy

panels.description: Busy state of all CPU cores together (5 min average)
panels.title: Proc Queue Length

targets.expr: (sum by(instance) (irate(windows_cpu_time_total{host="$host", mode!="idle"}[$__rate_interval])) / on(instance) group_left sum by (instance)((irate(windows_cpu_time_total{host="$host"}[$__rate_interval])))) * 100

panels.description: The number (after merges) of I/O requests completed per second for the device
panels.title: Disk IO

title: Windows Server Monitoring
